section.heading: Community-based restoration program for fishery and coastal habitats

content.p: The Secretary of Commerce shall establish a community-based fishery and coastal habitat restoration program to implement and support the restoration of fishery and coastal habitats.

subsection.heading: Authorized activities
subsection.chapeau: In carrying out the program, the Secretary may—

paragraph.content: provide funding and technical expertise to fishery and coastal communities to assist them in restoring fishery and coastal habitat;
advance the science and monitoring of coastal habitat restoration;
transfer restoration technologies to the private sector, the public, and other governmental agencies;
develop public-private partnerships to accomplish sound coastal restoration projects;
promote significant community support and volunteer participation in fishery and coastal habitat restoration;
promote stewardship of fishery and coastal habitats; and
leverage resources through national, regional, and local public-private partnerships.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was enacted as part of the Magnuson-Stevens Fishery Conservation and Management Reauthorization Act of 2006, and not as part of the Magnuson-Stevens Fishery Conservation and Management Act which comprises this chapter.
